column1: # Copy this file into the muninn repo as automation/backlog.tsv and adjust task_file paths if needed.

column5: title
Typed memory schema and metadata scaffold
column7: Added src/memory/types.zig with MemoryKind, RetentionTier, SourceMeta, Confidence, TypedRecord; exported from root.zig; 6/6 tests pass

column5: Tool reliability wrapper skeleton with retries/timeouts
column7: Added src/tools/reliability.zig with ToolPolicy, ToolHealth, CircuitState, reliableExecute wrapper; imported from root.zig; all tests pass

column5: Persistent task state machine scaffold
column7: Added src/tasks.zig with TaskStatus, TaskPriority, StepStatus, StepRecord, RetryPolicy, TaskRecord; exported from root.zig; 12/12 tests pass

column5: Structured event timeline primitives and file sink
column7: Added src/events.zig with EventKind, EventSeverity, EventCorrelation, EventRecord; added src/events_store.zig with JSONL EventStore sink and serializeEvent; exported from root.zig; 18/18 tests pass

column5: Explainable policy deny reasons and audit event hook
column7: Added DenyCode enum, PolicyDeny struct, PolicyResult union, validateCommandDetailed method, isCommandAllowedDetailed, PolicyDenyHook callback; re-exported from security/root.zig; 119/119 tests pass

column5: Episodic vs semantic split plus confidence decay primitives
column7: Added src/memory/decay.zig with DecayModel, DecayParams, EpisodicMeta, SemanticMeta, computeDecay, recencyScore, reinforceConfidence; exported from root.zig; integration TODOs in types.zig; 25/25 new tests pass

column5: Tool cache and circuit breaker framework
column7: Added CacheKey, CacheEntry, CachePolicy, ToolCache (bounded HashMap with TTL eviction), cachedOrAllow decision helper, FNV-1a arg hashing; 22 new tests (37 total in reliability.zig); all pass

column5: Verifier hook and step-level retry policy
column7: Added StepRetryPolicy, VerifyResult, VerifierHookFn, VerifierConfig, shouldRetryStep, recordStepRetry, failStep, completeStep, applyVerifyResult; verifier field on TaskRecord (disabled by default); retry_policy field on StepRecord; 30 new tests (42 total in tasks.zig); all pass

column5: Replay mode skeleton and budget metrics summary
column7: Added src/replay.zig with ReplaySession, ReplayPosition, SessionSummary, BudgetStatus, BudgetSummary, loadReplaySession stub, buildBudgetSummary (CostTracker integration), summarizeSession helper; exported from root.zig; 21/21 new tests pass (37 total with deps)

column5: Secret scoping and per-workspace approval policy config
column7: Added src/security/scope.zig with SecretScope, ScopedSecretEntry, WorkspaceApprovalPolicy, and lookup helpers (isSecretAccessible, findWorkspacePolicy, resolveAutonomy, resolveApprovalForMediumRisk, resolveBlockHighRisk, resolveMaxActionsPerHour); added ScopedSecretConfig, WorkspaceApprovalPolicyConfig to config_types.zig; exported from security/root.zig; 23 new tests (278 total in security module); all pass

column5: Compact event log and bounded task queue defaults
column7: Added src/edge.zig with EdgeProfile, edgeEventStore, edgeSchedulerConfig, edgeAgentConfig helpers; compact logging (warn+, 1KB buffer, 1MiB cap), bounded queue (8 tasks, 1 concurrent), constrained agent defaults; exported from root.zig; 15/15 new tests pass (33 total with deps)

column5: Offline queue and deferred sync-out skeleton
column7: Added src/offline.zig with QueueItemKind, QueuePriority, QueueItemStatus, QueueItem, serializeItem, OfflineQueue (JSONL persistence), offlineQueueFromConfig, edgeOfflineQueue; added OfflineQueueConfig to config_types.zig; exported from root.zig; 25/25 tests pass

column5: Remote planning delegation client stub to huginn
column7: Added src/delegation.zig with PlanRequestKind, PlanPriority, PlanResponseStatus, PlanRequest, PlanStep, PlanResponse, serializeRequest, DelegationClient stub (requestPlan, checkStatus, isReachable); added DelegationConfig to config_types.zig; exported from root.zig; 26/26 tests pass

column5: Shared sync protocol types and schema versioning
column7: Added src/sync/protocol.zig with SchemaVersion, NodeRole, DeltaKind, DeltaOp, SyncDirection, AckStatus, EventDelta, TaskDelta, MemoryDelta, SyncEnvelope, SyncAck, serializeEnvelope, serializeAck; src/sync/root.zig re-exports; SyncConfig in config_types.zig; docs/sync-protocol.md skeleton; exported from root.zig; 31/31 tests pass

column5: Conflict resolution policy implementation skeleton
column7: Added src/sync/conflict.zig with ConflictSide, ConflictOutcome, ConflictRecord, resolveBySourceOwnership, resolveByConfirmedAt, resolveByConfidence, resolveByUpdatedAt, resolveTask, resolveMemory, resolve; re-exported from sync/root.zig; 29 new tests (61 total in sync module); all pass

column5: Federated task routing handshake and heartbeat message flow
column7: Added src/sync/handshake.zig with HandshakePhase, HandshakeIntent, NodeHealth, ConnectionState, HandshakeInit, HandshakeResponse, Heartbeat, HeartbeatAck; state transition helpers (send/receive init/accept/reject, fail, reset); heartbeat miss/success processing; JSONL serialization; re-exported from sync/root.zig; docs/sync-protocol.md updated; 38 new tests (99 total in sync module); all pass

column5: Wire secret scope enforcement into retrieval path
Implement Landlock syscall bindings for sandbox backend
Wire confidence decay into memory recall ranking
Wire hybrid vector+keyword search end-to-end
Adopt reliability framework in shell, http_request, web_search tools
Implement event replay JSONL parsing and stats computation
Implement Slack Socket Mode for real-time message receiving
Add Discord slash command registration and handling
Complete offline queue with JSONL persistence and drain loop
Wire delegation client HTTP transport for plan requests
SQLite schema migration for TypedRecord metadata columns
Replace gateway subprocess fallback with graceful error
Add Discord thread support for long conversations
Implement episodic-to-semantic memory consolidation
Add audit log querying CLI command
Per-tool timeout configuration and usage analytics
Expand /health endpoint with component-level status
